_note: Synthetic composite of typical rural Tamil Nadu village logistics. Replaces docs/ASSETS.md CareGraph data which lives on a different machine. Numbers calibrated against publicly reported PHC distances and bus-fare ranges. v2 will use real data from a chosen village.

primary_health_centre.lab_capacity: basic_blood_count + urine_dipstick; no imaging, no culture

private_clinic_in_village._note: RMP/quack-risk; not a substitute for the PHC for serious cases.

amoxicillin_500mg_oral._note: free under govt scheme when stock is available

household_economics._note: round-trip transport for the PHC ≈ one-seventh of a day's wage. District trip ≈ half a day's wage plus 5 hours of time.

seasonal_calendar.labor_demand_today: peak — leaving the field costs visible income today

cultural_factors: neighbor's opinion often substitutes for clinical advice in mild cases
private RMP visited first because the PHC has limited evening hours
tetanus risk underappreciated for small wounds from agricultural metalwork
fever in children commonly home-treated for 24-48h before help-seeking
